name: Algolia
description: Algolia is a hosted search and discovery API that delivers fast, relevant search results in milliseconds. It supports full-text search, faceted filtering, typo tolerance, geo-search, and AI-powered recommendations across indexes of structured data.

auth.note: Also requires x-algolia-application-id header with your Application ID.

capabilities.name: search_single_index
capabilities.description: Perform a full-text search query against a single index with filters, facets, and pagination.

capabilities.name: search_multiple_indices
capabilities.description: Execute multiple search queries across one or more indices in a single API call.

capabilities.name: search_for_facet_values
capabilities.description: Search for values of a specific facet attribute for building facet autocomplete.

capabilities.name: records_browse
capabilities.description: Iterate over all records in an index without relevance ranking for data export.

capabilities.name: records_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve one or more records by their objectIDs from one or more indices.

capabilities.name: records_save
capabilities.description: Add or replace a record in an index.

capabilities.name: records_partial_update
capabilities.description: Partially update a record by merging attributes without full replacement.

capabilities.name: records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific record from an index by its objectID.

capabilities.name: records_batch
capabilities.description: Perform multiple write operations in a single batch request for bulk indexing.

capabilities.name: records_delete_by_query
capabilities.description: Delete all records matching a filter expression from an index.

capabilities.name: indices_list
capabilities.description: List all indices in the application with metadata and entry counts.

capabilities.name: indices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an entire index and all its data permanently.

capabilities.name: indices_clear
capabilities.description: Remove all records from an index while keeping settings, synonyms, and rules.

capabilities.name: indices_copy
capabilities.description: Copy an index to a new or existing index with optional scope filtering.

capabilities.name: indices_move
capabilities.description: Rename an index by moving it to a new name.

capabilities.name: settings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current search configuration of an index.

capabilities.name: settings_update
capabilities.description: Update the search configuration of an index.

capabilities.name: synonyms_save
capabilities.description: Create or update a synonym set for an index.

capabilities.name: synonyms_search
capabilities.description: Search for synonyms defined on an index.

capabilities.name: synonyms_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific synonym set from an index.

capabilities.name: rules_save
capabilities.description: Create or update a query rule for customizing search behavior.

capabilities.name: rules_search
capabilities.description: Search for query rules defined on an index.

capabilities.name: rules_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific query rule from an index.

capabilities.name: api_keys_list
capabilities.description: List all API keys with their permissions and restrictions.

capabilities.name: api_keys_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve permissions and restrictions of a specific API key.

capabilities.name: api_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API key with specific permissions and index restrictions.

capabilities.name: api_keys_update
capabilities.description: Update the permissions or restrictions of an existing API key.

capabilities.name: api_keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an API key permanently.

capabilities.name: task_get
capabilities.description: Check the status of an asynchronous indexing task.
